name: Fredrikstad Sci-fi Festival
description:
Fredrikstad Sci-fi Festival (FSFF) is an annual sci-fi and pop-culture festival held in the old fortress town of Fredrikstad in southeastern Norway. The programme blends film screenings at Fredrikstad Kino with cosplay competitions, fan panels, workshops, gaming areas and a vendor hall.

The festival positions itself as a multi-day celebration of sci-fi, fantasy and geek culture, drawing attendees from across the Oslofjord region and welcoming both casual fans and dedicated cosplayers.
notes: Logo + banner were captured manually from earlier scraping; banner is the 2025 cyber-hooded promo art with 1.-4. mai 2025 overlay. Dates above are for the 2026 edition (Apr 30 – May 3) per visitfredrikstadhvaler.com listing.
